backlog.title: Add a real live award search tool to platform/public/index.html
backlog.description: Open platform/public/index.html. Find the results section. Replace the static sample cards with a fully working search tool — user types origin airport, destination airport, selects cabin class, clicks Search, and sees dynamically generated award results calculated using real CPP formulas. Use vanilla JavaScript only. Results must show airline, miles required, cash equivalent, CPP rating, and EXCELLENT/GOOD/FAIR/SKIP verdict. Add at least 20 real airline program redemption rates hardcoded in a JS object.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-20. Files: index.html, styles.css, script.js

backlog.title: Build a complete client dashboard page at platform/public/dashboard.html
backlog.description: Build platform/public/dashboard.html — the page users see after logging in. Show: welcome message with their name from localStorage, their submitted miles balances, their saved searches, upcoming trips table, and a miles value calculator. Dark theme matching index.html exactly. Link to it from the login flow in index.html.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-20. Files: dashboard.html, styles.css, index.html

backlog.title: Build the FastAPI backend server for District Award Travel
backlog.description: Build platform/src/api/server.py — complete FastAPI backend. Routes: POST /api/intake (receives form data from the intake form and saves to SQLite), GET /api/clients (returns all clients as JSON), POST /api/auth/signup, POST /api/auth/login (returns JWT), GET /api/search?origin=JFK&destination=NRT&cabin=F (returns award results). Build platform/src/api/models.py with SQLAlchemy models for Client, User, Search. Add CORS for GitHub Pages domain.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-20. Files: models.py, schemas.py, database.py

backlog.title: Build automated transfer bonus monitor and alert system
backlog.description: Build platform/src/pipeline/transfer_monitor.py — checks for transfer bonuses across all major programs (Amex, Chase, Citi, Capital One). Scrapes or uses mock data to detect when a transfer bonus is active (e.g. 30% bonus transferring Amex to ANA). Saves active bonuses to platform/data/transfer_bonuses.json. Build platform/public/bonuses.html — a public page showing all current transfer bonuses with countdown timers.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-20. Files: transfer_monitor.py, bonuses.html, main.py

backlog.title: Build complete Docker infrastructure for one-command deployment
backlog.description: Build platform/infra/docker-compose.yml that runs the entire District Award Travel stack: api service (FastAPI on port 8000), nginx service (serves platform/public/ as static site, proxies /api/ to FastAPI). Build platform/infra/Dockerfile for the API. Build platform/infra/nginx.conf. Build platform/infra/start.sh that runs docker-compose up and opens the browser. Anyone should be able to clone the repo and run ./start.sh to have the full platform running.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-20. Files: docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile, nginx.conf

backlog.title: Build private admin dashboard at platform/public/admin/index.html
backlog.description: Build platform/public/admin/index.html — a password-protected admin panel. Password: hardcoded check against a secret string. Show: all client submissions in a table, total revenue calculated, search pipeline status, engineer activity log (reads from logs/ folder), transfer bonus alerts. Dark theme matching the main site. This is for internal use only.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-20. Files: docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile, Dockerfile

backlog.title: Implement Scalable Kubernetes Cluster for Automated Deployment
backlog.description: Design and deploy a scalable Kubernetes cluster to automate the deployment of District Award Travel's infrastructure, ensuring high availability, scalability, and fault tolerance. Integrate with existing Docker infrastructure to enable seamless one-command deployment and monitoring.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-21. Files: docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf, deployment.yaml

backlog.title: Develop Real-time Monitoring and Alerting System with Prometheus and Grafana
backlog.description: Build a real-time monitoring and alerting system using Prometheus and Grafana to track key performance metrics, such as search query latency, booking success rates, and system uptime. Integrate with existing alert systems to ensure timely notifications and minimize downtime.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-21. Files: docker-compose.yml, prometheus.yml, alertmanager.yml

backlog.title: Optimize Award Search Algorithm using Graph Database and Neo4j
backlog.description: Investigate the use of graph databases, such as Neo4j, to optimize the award search algorithm. Model airline routes, award availability, and transfer bonuses as a graph to enable more efficient and accurate search results. Integrate with existing FastAPI backend server to leverage the optimized algorithm.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-21. Files: models.py, database.py, main.py

backlog.title: Develop Data Pipeline for Real-time Award Availability Updates using Apache Kafka
backlog.description: Design and implement a data pipeline using Apache Kafka to stream real-time award availability updates from airline APIs and other sources. Process and store the data in a scalable database, such as Apache Cassandra, to enable fast and accurate search results. Integrate with existing data visualization tools to display up-to-date award availability information.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-21. Files: config.py, schemas.py, models.py

backlog.title: Build AI-powered Award Recommendation Engine using TensorFlow and scikit-learn
backlog.description: Develop an AI-powered award recommendation engine using TensorFlow and scikit-learn to suggest personalized award travel options to clients. Train machine learning models on historical booking data and client preferences to predict the most likely award redemptions. Integrate with existing client dashboard to display tailored recommendations.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-21. Files: recommendation_engine.py, data_pipeline.py

backlog.title: Create Interactive Award Travel Planning Tool using React and D3.js
backlog.description: Design and build an interactive award travel planning tool using React and D3.js to help clients visualize and optimize their award travel itineraries. Integrate with existing award search tool to enable seamless searching and booking of recommended award travel options. Display interactive maps, calendars, and graphs to facilitate informed decision-making.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-21. Files: index.html, styles.css
